name: oh-my-tradingview
description: MCP bridge for TradingView Desktop via Chrome DevTools Protocol — Pine Script development loop

scripts.test:unit: node --test tests/connection.test.js tests/pine.analyze.test.js tests/price.test.js tests/backtest.test.js tests/pine.smart-compile.test.js tests/campaign.test.js tests/campaign-report.test.js tests/generate-rich-report.test.js tests/generate-strategy-reference.test.js tests/experiment-gating.test.js tests/launch.test.js tests/capture.test.js tests/stream.test.js tests/market-intel.test.js tests/market-intel-analysis.test.js tests/market-confluence.test.js tests/market-community-snapshot.test.js tests/market-provider-status.test.js tests/fundamental-screener.test.js tests/sec-edgar.test.js tests/daily-screener-report.test.js tests/workspace.test.js tests/alerts.test.js tests/observability.test.js tests/browser-launch.test.js tests/twitter-read.test.js tests/reach.test.js tests/moomoo.test.js tests/windows-run-night-batch-self-hosted.test.js tests/archive-latest-policy.test.js tests/strategy-catalog.test.js tests/strategy-live-retired-diff.test.js tests/output-compaction.test.js tests/agent-skills-conformance.test.js tests/tradingview-readiness.test.js tests/portfolio-converter.test.js tests/documentation-navigation.test.js
scripts.test:e2e: node --test tests/e2e.pine-loop.test.js tests/e2e.price.test.js tests/e2e.backtest.test.js tests/e2e.workspace.test.js tests/e2e.alerts.test.js tests/e2e.observability.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:night-batch && npm run test:e2e
